# `nise store gc`

- **Usage**: `nise store gc [FLAGS]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/store/gc.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/store/gc.rs)

Dry-run nise store garbage collection

## Flags

### `--delete`

Delete unreachable objects

### `--dry-run`

Show what would be collected

### `-J --json`

Output JSON
